markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on WebStacks strategy to secure an annual contract.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Critical Performance Drop:** WebStacks' non-brand traffic halved (\~7.4k → \~3.7k sessions/week) after a Jan website redesign, signaling a major SEO issue. Kyle is investigating.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Annual Contract Blocked:** The CFO, Sean, demands a 20% discount for an annual contract, despite WebStacks already paying a low rate for high content volume.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [**Strategic Roadmap:** The plan is a flexible 6-month roadmap focused on driving conversions, not just traffic, to justify the current rate and secure the annual deal.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Q1 Initiative:** The current focus is building CMS partner hubs (starting with Sanity) to create shareable assets for campaigns and improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)

## Topics

### Critical Performance Drop

  - [**Observation:** Non-brand traffic halved after the Jan website redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Hypotheses:**](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Primary:** SEO damage from the redesign (e.g., broken links, ranking loss).](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
      - [**Secondary:** Publishing delays from a team member's illness.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Data Anomaly:** The Looker dashboard shows a near 1:1 ratio of sessions to engagement, which is highly unusual and suggests a data tracking issue.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Action:** Kyle will investigate the root cause today.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Annual Contract Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Secure an annual contract at the current rate by demonstrating long-term strategic value.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Blocker:** CFO Sean demands a 20% discount.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The current rate is already a "screaming deal" for the content volume provided.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Strategic Roadmap for Annual Contract

  - [**Approach:** A flexible 6-month roadmap focused on driving conversions, not just traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [**Framework:**](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
    1.  [**Identify Strategic Themes:** Focus on key business goals and promising traffic signals.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
    2.  [**Audit Content Gaps:** Determine if themes require new content or refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
    3.  [**Enhance Engagement:** Layer in successful elements from past tests.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** Improve internal linking between articles and underperforming product/solution pages to build topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Q1 Initiative: CMS Partner Hubs

  - [**Focus:** Building CMS partner hubs (starting with Sanity) to create shareable assets for campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Goal:** Improve user experience by replacing the old "SEO bet" footer with a dynamic banner featuring relevant blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [**Future:** Expand this model to other topics (e.g., tools) if successful.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Fathom Migration Urgency

  - [**Issue:** Fathom migration is stalled.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [**Action:** Katya will ping the executive assistant to schedule a meeting this week.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [**Backup Plan:** If migration is delayed, Kyle will scope work to refine canonicals.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:** Investigate WebStacks' traffic drop and report findings to Katya (due: EOD today).](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Flag the traffic drop with WebStacks on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Draft the 6-month strategic roadmap for internal review.](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [Schedule the Fathom migration meeting (due: today).](https://fathom.video/share/yr5aMtbT_bBGFfRJmV7ssFGyPSLx61oU?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
